notes: Desktop (1440x900): eventsAboveFold=1 reflects that the hero is a large single-event promotional banner (BTS). The 'Popular tickets' rail starts below the fold at 1440x900. filterOptionsVisible=0 because the nav category links (Music, Sport, Arts, etc.) matched zero elements with the filter/category selectors used; the nav links are present but use custom class names not matching standard patterns. ctasAboveFold=7 includes nav utility links (Gift cards, Group Bookings, Help, Sell Tickets), the hero Find Tickets CTA, and Search button.

Mobile (375x812): Similar pattern. Hero BTS card is prominent above fold. ctasAboveFold=10 is higher due to smaller viewport counting more link elements in relative positions. filterOptionsVisible=0 same reason as desktop.
Actual nav category filters visible above fold on desktop: Music, Sport, Arts/Theatre/Comedy, Family/Attractions, Cities, More = 6 items. Not captured by density selector due to custom class names.
eventsAboveFold is conservative. Visually the homepage shows 1 large hero event + partial view of 2 cards in the Popular Tickets rail at 1440x900 desktop.
